case_title: KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC. VS. DAWN BURRELL et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY GUERRINI, JOHN D
NTC OF HRG ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION; NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC. HEARING SET FOR OCT-09-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT TAKES CLAIM OF EXEMPTION UNDER SUBMISSION FOR DECISION. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 *AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS RE: PLAINTIFF KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC.'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. MS. BURRELL HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT SHE IS ENTITLED TO A CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE SHERIFF SHALL RELEASE THE FUNDS CURRENTLY HELD TO PLAINTIFF. ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING.*

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC.'s Motion For An Order Determining The Claim Of Exemption is denied. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Ntc Of Hrg On Claim Of Exemption; Notice
Off Calendar Oct-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DAWN BURRELL, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. AT CONCLUSION OF DISCUSSION, THE COURT TAKES CLAIM OF EXEMPTION UNDER SUBMISSION FOR DECISION. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
*AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS RE: PLAINTIFF KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN INC.'S Notice Of Hearing On DEFENDANT'S Claim Of Exemption. THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. Ms. Burrell has not demonstrated that she is entitled to a claim of exemption. The Sheriff shall release the funds currently held to Plaintiff. Order signed AFTER HEARING.*
